sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'N', 'R', 'G'):
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("\nTotal red:", sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R'))
print("\nGame over state reached. Level 1 failed.")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
